name: batch_create_feishu_bitable_records
description: Creates multiple records in a Bitable table in one call.

appToken.description: Bitable app token (required). Found in the URL of a Feishu Bitable: `https://xxx.feishu.cn/base/{appToken}`.

tableId.description: Bitable table ID (required). Found in the URL query parameter `table={tableId}`, typically starts with "tbl".

fields.description:
Record fields as a key-value object. Field names are the visible names in Bitable. Values depend on field type:
- Text: "hello"
- Number: 123
- Date: 1704067200000 (timestamp in milliseconds)
- Single select: "Option A"
- Multi select: ["Option A", "Option B"]
- User: [{ id: "ou_xxx", id_type: "open_id" }]
- Checkbox: true
- URL: { text: "Google", link: "https://google.com" }

records.description: Array of records to create (required). Each item contains a `fields` object.
